title: CreateTagsFix
body:
# IF YOU WANT ME TO ADD OTHER BLOCKS, CREATE AN ISSUE ON GITHUB OR ASK ME ON THE DISCORD LINKED AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE

Fixes various blocks on create contraptions.
This works by adding tags to modded, and some vanilla blocks. Check out createccfix/data/create/tags/blocks/ on the github for a list of tags. The tags are the file names.\
The fix for the original problem was suggested by the author of this [issue](https://github.com/tweaked-programs/cccbridge/issues/82), and now the project has expanded to adding tags to any blocks that need a create tag.

I would recommend that if the mod works for your version, you use it instead of the datapack, as the datapack has to be installed to the datapacks folder for each world, which is a bit tiresome.

Supported Blocks:\
supplementaries candle holders [https://github.com/MehVahdJukaar/Supplementaries/issues/1086](https://github.com/MehVahdJukaar/Supplementaries/issues/1086)\
computercraft modems - these are fixed in cc:tweaked 1.110.2\
vanilla moss carpet - fixed in create patch h\
vanilla banners - fixed in create patch h\
vanilla cake - fixed in create patch h

Most blocks have been fixed in dev versions of the respective mods apart from supplementaries, where no-one has replied to me, but leaving them in the datapack doesn't affect the fixed versions, ~~so i'm leaving them in for now~~ (I've removed the fixed blocks from 4.0+).

If you have any issues or ideas for improvement, create an issue on the github or join the discord.

If you have other blocks that have the same problem, please comment on the pinned issue on the github.

Github:
[https://github.com/Plite7067/CreateCCModemFix](https://github.com/Plite7067/CreateCCModemFix)

Discord:
[https://discord.gg/JVnsenjzUd](https://discord.gg/JVnsenjzUd)
